def function

random_pick_count <- function(dataInput, sampleSize = 1000) {
  sample_data <- dataInput[sample(nrow(dataInput), min(sampleSize, nrow(dataInput))), ]
  
  # Cell rate
  mut_cells_rate_original <- 1 - sum(sample_data$altCellNum_original == 0) / sampleSize
  mut_cells_rate_simple <- 1 - sum(sample_data$altCellNum_simple1000 == 0) / sampleSize
  mut_cells_rate_scMutrace <- 1 - sum(sample_data$altCellNum_feature1000 == 0) / sampleSize
  
  # Read rate
  mut_reads_rate_original <- sum(sample_data$reads_alt_original) /
    (sum(sample_data$reads_ref_original) + sum(sample_data$reads_alt_original))
  mut_reads_rate_simple <- sum(sample_data$reads_alt_simple1000) /
    (sum(sample_data$reads_ref_simple1000) + sum(sample_data$reads_alt_simple1000))
  mut_reads_rate_scMutrace <- sum(sample_data$reads_alt_feature1000) /
    (sum(sample_data$reads_ref_feature1000) + sum(sample_data$reads_alt_feature1000))
  
  # Site rate
  mut_sites_rate_original <- 1 - mean(sample_data$reads_alt_original <= 1)
  mut_sites_rate_simple <- 1 - mean(sample_data$reads_alt_simple1000 <= 1)
  mut_sites_rate_scMutrace <- 1 - mean(sample_data$reads_alt_feature1000 <= 1)
  
  res <- data.frame(
    mutCell_original = mut_cells_rate_original,
    mutCell_simple = mut_cells_rate_simple,
    mutCell_scMutrace = mut_cells_rate_scMutrace,
    mutRead_original = mut_reads_rate_original,
    mutRead_simple = mut_reads_rate_simple,
    mutRead_scMutrace = mut_reads_rate_scMutrace,
    mutSite_original = mut_sites_rate_original,
    mutSite_simple = mut_sites_rate_simple,
    mutSite_scMutrace = mut_sites_rate_scMutrace
  )
  
  return(res)
}

How to generate random data

# Example
###########################
# Step 1: randomly pick 100,000 lines from vcf file without repeat
###########################
# vcfIn="/path/to/your/vcf/file.vcf" # output of scMutrace vcf file 
# python random_pick_lines_no_repeat.py ${vcfIn} 100000 ${vcfIn}_random_pick

###########################
# Step 2: estimate random background from the random picked vcf file
###########################
# outDir="/path/to/your/output/directory/"
# bamIn="/path/to/your/bam/file.bam" # input bam file
# genome.fa="/path/to/your/reference/genome.fa" # reference genome fasta file
# sample="sampleID" # sample ID
# python 0_runStep2_EstimateCluster.py --outdir ${outDir} --bam ${bamIn} 
#          --ref ${genome.fa} --vcfpath ${vcfIn}_random_pick --id ${sample} 
#          --binsize 5 --dpsize 5 --altdpsize 3 --cellsize 5 --altcellsize 2 
#          --min_bq 20 --min_mq 20 --cbtag CB --nprocs 10

loadData

# define col names
col_Names_data <- c("base_quality_original",
                    "base_quality_simple100","base_quality_simple1000",
                    "base_quality_simple100Wei","base_quality_simple1000Wei",
                    "base_quality_feature100","base_quality_feature1000",
                    "reads_ref_original","reads_alt_original","reads_num_original",
                    "reads_ref_simple100","reads_alt_simple100","reads_num_simple100",
                    "reads_ref_simple1000","reads_alt_simple1000","reads_num_simple1000",
                    "reads_ref_simple100Wei","reads_alt_simple100Wei","reads_num_simple100Wei",
                    "reads_ref_simple1000Wei","reads_alt_simple1000Wei","reads_num_simple1000Wei",
                    "reads_ref_feature100","reads_alt_feature100","reads_num_feature100",
                    "reads_ref_feature1000","reads_alt_feature1000","reads_num_feature1000",
                    "totalCellsNum_original_raw",
                    "altCellNum_original", "totalCellsNum_original", 
                    "altCellNum_simple100", "totalCellsNum_simple100", 
                    "altCellNum_simple1000", "totalCellsNum_simple1000", 
                    "altCellNum_simple100Wei", "totalCellsNum_simple100Wei", 
                    "altCellNum_simple1000Wei", "totalCellsNum_simple1000Wei", 
                    "altCellNum_feature100", "totalCellsNum_feature100", 
                    "altCellNum_feature1000", "totalCellsNum_feature1000")

# define file tags
file_tags <- list(
  SMART_ERCC_random = "Mouse_SMART_ERCC",
  SMART_random = "Mouse_SMART_random",
  P16358_6001_random = "Mouse_Tenx_random",
  AML16_DX_scATA_random = "Human_Tenx_scATAC_DX_random",
  AML16_REM_scATA_random = "Human_Tenx_scATAC_REM_random",
  AML16_REL_scATA_random = "Human_Tenx_scATAC_REL_random",
  AML16_DX_scRNA_random = "Human_Tenx_scRNA_DX_random",
  AML16_REM_scRNA_random = "Human_Tenx_scRNA_REM_random",
  AML16_REL_scRNA_random = "Human_Tenx_scRNA_REL_random",
  EPSRC1_scRNA_random = "EPSRC1_Tenx_scRNA_random",
  EPSRC2_scRNA_random = "EPSRC2_Tenx_scRNA_random",
  EPSRC4_scRNA_random = "EPSRC4_Tenx_scRNA_random",
  EPSRC1_scATA_random = "EPSRC1_Tenx_scATA_random",
  EPSRC2_scATA_random = "EPSRC2_Tenx_scATA_random",
  EPSRC4_scATA_random = "EPSRC4_Tenx_scATA_random",
  Tenx_ERCC_random = "Tenx_ERCC_random"
)

# load data
allDataList <- lapply(names(file_tags), function(name) {
  message(name)
  file_path <- file.path("../Data/RandomData", paste0(name, ".est.random"))
  dat <- read.table(file_path, header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
  colnames(dat) <- col_Names_data
  dat$Tag <- file_tags[[name]]
  return(dat)
})

# merge
data_merge_noise <- do.call(rbind, allDataList)

data_Mut_quality <- data_merge_noise[,c("base_quality_original", "base_quality_simple1000", "base_quality_feature1000")]

data_Mut_quality_re <- melt(t(data_Mut_quality))

colorAssign_1 = c(base_quality_original = "black", 
                base_quality_simple100 = "#e5f5e0", base_quality_simple1000 = "#20854EFF",
                base_quality_simple100Wei = "#9ecae1",base_quality_simple1000Wei = "#084594",
                base_quality_feature100 = "#fee5d9", base_quality_feature1000 = "#E18F6A")

p_mut_basequality <- ggplot(data_Mut_quality_re) + 
  xlab("Fraction of bases with quality above 30") + 
  geom_density(mapping = aes(x = 100 - value, color = Var1), show.legend = TRUE, alpha = 0.3) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = colorAssign_1) +
  geom_rug() + theme_bw() + theme(panel.grid=element_blank())

p_mut_basequality

function to count mut cell and read

# function to count mut cell and read
count_mutCellRead <- function(data_merge_Input, sampleSize = 1000, n_iter = 1000) {
  set.seed(2025)
  
  res_list <- vector("list", n_iter)
  
  for (i in seq_len(n_iter)) {
    tmp_res <- random_pick_count(data_merge_Input, sampleSize)
    tmp_res$iteration <- i
    res_list[[i]] <- tmp_res
  }
  
  data_Plot <- dplyr::bind_rows(res_list)
  return(data_Plot)
}

# merge all data
uniqueTags <- unique(data_merge_noise$Tag)
plot_list <- list()

for (tag in uniqueTags) {
  message(paste0("Processing ", tag))
  tmp_data <- data_merge_noise %>% dplyr::filter(Tag == tag)
  tmp_plot <- count_mutCellRead(tmp_data, sampleSize = 1000, n_iter = 1000)
  tmp_plot$Tag <- tag
  plot_list[[tag]] <- tmp_plot
}

data_merge_noiseEST_Plot <- do.call(rbind, plot_list)
p_background_est_read <- ggplot(
  data_merge_noiseEST_Plot[
    data_merge_noiseEST_Plot$Tag %in% c(
      "Human_Tenx_scATAC_DX_random",
      "Human_Tenx_scRNA_DX_random",
      "Human_Tenx_scATAC_REM_random",
      "Human_Tenx_scRNA_REM_random",
      "Human_Tenx_scATAC_REL_random",
      "Human_Tenx_scRNA_REL_random",
      "EPSRC1_Tenx_scRNA_random",
      "EPSRC2_Tenx_scRNA_random",
      "EPSRC4_Tenx_scRNA_random",
      "EPSRC1_Tenx_scATA_random",
      "EPSRC2_Tenx_scATA_random",
      "EPSRC4_Tenx_scATA_random"
    ),],
  aes(
    x = mutRead_scMutrace,
    color = Tag,
    linetype = ifelse(grepl("scRNA", Tag), "RNA", "ATAC")
  )
) +
  geom_density(aes(alpha = 0.4)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "Mutation Read Ratio",
    y = "Density",
    title = "Density plot of Mutation Read Ratio by Tag"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Human_Tenx_scATAC_DX_random" = "#33a02c",
      "Human_Tenx_scRNA_DX_random" = "#33a02c",
      "Human_Tenx_scATAC_REM_random" = "#1f78b4",
      "Human_Tenx_scRNA_REM_random" = "#1f78b4",
      "Human_Tenx_scATAC_REL_random" = "#e31a1c",
      "Human_Tenx_scRNA_REL_random" = "#e31a1c",
      "EPSRC1_Tenx_scRNA_random" = "#ff7f00", 
      "EPSRC2_Tenx_scRNA_random" = "#6a3d9a",
      "EPSRC4_Tenx_scRNA_random" = "#b15928",
      "EPSRC1_Tenx_scATA_random" = "#ff7f00",
      "EPSRC2_Tenx_scATA_random" = "#6a3d9a",
      "EPSRC4_Tenx_scATA_random" = "#b15928"
    )
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("RNA" = "solid", "ATAC" = "dashed")
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

Mouse background

p_background_est_read_mouse <- ggplot(
  data_merge_noiseEST_Plot[
    data_merge_noiseEST_Plot$Tag %in% c(
      "Mouse_SMART_ERCC",
      "Mouse_SMART_random",
      "Mouse_Tenx_random"
    ),],
  aes(
    x = mutRead_scMutrace,
    color = Tag
  )
) +
  geom_density(aes(alpha = 0.4)) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "Distribution of background reads",
    y = "Density",
    title = "Density plot of Mutation Read Ratio by Tag"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Mouse_SMART_ERCC" = "#EBAC8C",
      "Mouse_SMART_random" = "#345170",
      "Mouse_Tenx_random" = "#33a02c"
    )
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

p_background_est_read_mouse

Mouse somatic number

Mouse_tenx_csm <- readRDS("../Data/Mouse/Mouse_tenx_csm.rds")
Mouse_tenx_meta <- readRDS("../Data/Mouse/Mouse_tenx_meta.rds")

Mouse_smar_csm <- as.data.frame(t(readRDS("../Data/Mouse/Mouse_smart_csm.rds")))
Mouse_smar_meta <- readRDS("../Data/Mouse/Mouse_smart_meta.rds")

data_MutPerCell_tenx <- data.frame(
  CellTag = rownames(Mouse_tenx_csm),
  MutNum_somatic = rowSums(Mouse_tenx_csm == "Mut"),
  WTNum_somatic = rowSums(Mouse_tenx_csm == "WT")
)

data_MutPerCell_smart <- data.frame(
  CellTag = rownames(Mouse_smar_csm),
  MutNum_somatic = rowSums(Mouse_smar_csm == "Mut"),
  WTNum_somatic = rowSums(Mouse_smar_csm == "WT")
)

data_MutPerCell_smart$Barcode <- data_MutPerCell_smart$CellTag
data_MutPerCell_smart_meta <- merge(data_MutPerCell_smart, Mouse_smar_meta, by = "Barcode")

data_CellPerMut_tenx <- data.frame(
  Location = colnames(Mouse_tenx_csm),
  CellMutNum = colSums(Mouse_tenx_csm == "Mut"),
  CellWTNum = colSums(Mouse_tenx_csm == "WT")
)

data_CellPerMut_smart <- data.frame(
  Location = colnames(Mouse_smar_csm),
  CellMutNum = colSums(Mouse_smar_csm == "Mut"),
  CellWTNum = colSums(Mouse_smar_csm == "WT")
)

ERCC <- c(rep(0, 100))

boxplot(list(smart = data_MutPerCell_smart$MutNum_somatic,
             tenx = data_MutPerCell_tenx$MutNum_somatic,
             ERCC = ERCC),
        ylab = "somatic mutation number per cell",
        col = c("#1f78b4", "#33a02c", "#6a3d9a"))

cluster mismatches

col_Names_cluster <- c("chr", "pos", "clusterNum")

file_tags <- list(
  AML16_DX_scATA = "Human_scATAC_DX_cluster",
  AML16_REM_scATA = "Human_scATAC_REM_cluster",
  AML16_REL_scATA = "Human_scATAC_REL_cluster",
  AML16_DX_scRNA = "Human_scRNA_DX_cluster",
  AML16_REM_scRNA = "Human_scRNA_REM_cluster",
  AML16_REL_scRNA = "Human_scRNA_REL_cluster",
  EPSRC1_scRNA = "EPSRC1_scRNA_cluster",
  EPSRC2_scRNA = "EPSRC2_scRNA_cluster",
  EPSRC4_scRNA = "EPSRC4_scRNA_cluster",
  EPSRC1_scATA = "EPSRC1_scATA_cluster",
  EPSRC2_scATA = "EPSRC2_scATA_cluster",
  EPSRC4_scATA = "EPSRC4_scATA_cluster"
)


allDataList_cluster <- lapply(names(file_tags), function(name) {
  file_path <- file.path("../Data/randomCluster/", paste0(name, ".scmutrace.cluster.count"))
  dat <- read.table(file_path, header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
  colnames(dat) <- col_Names_cluster
  dat$Tag <- file_tags[[name]]
  return(dat)
})

data_merge_cluster <- do.call(rbind, allDataList_cluster)



plot(table(data_merge_cluster$clusterNum))


ggplot(data_merge_cluster, aes(x = factor(clusterNum), fill = Tag)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Human_scATAC_DX_cluster" = "#33a02c",
      "Human_scRNA_DX_cluster" = "#33a02c",
      "Human_scATAC_REM_cluster" = "#1f78b4",
      "Human_scRNA_REM_cluster" = "#1f78b4",
      "Human_scATAC_REL_cluster" = "#e31a1c",
      "Human_scRNA_REL_cluster" = "#e31a1c",
      "EPSRC1_scATA_cluster" = "#ff7f00",
      "EPSRC1_scRNA_cluster" = "#ff7f00", 
      "EPSRC2_scATA_cluster" = "#6a3d9a",
      "EPSRC2_scRNA_cluster" = "#6a3d9a",
      "EPSRC4_scATA_cluster" = "#b15928",
      "EPSRC4_scRNA_cluster" = "#b15928"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Cluster Number Distribution by Tag",
    x = "Cluster Number",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Tag"
  )



data_merge_cluster$modality <- ifelse(grepl("scRNA", data_merge_cluster$Tag), "scRNA", "scATAC")

p_cluster_est <- ggplot(data_merge_cluster, aes(x = factor(clusterNum), fill = Tag)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  #geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  facet_wrap(~ modality, ncol = 1) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      "Human_scATAC_DX_cluster" = "#33a02c",
      "Human_scRNA_DX_cluster" = "#33a02c",
      "Human_scATAC_REM_cluster" = "#1f78b4",
      "Human_scRNA_REM_cluster" = "#1f78b4",
      "Human_scATAC_REL_cluster" = "#e31a1c",
      "Human_scRNA_REL_cluster" = "#e31a1c",
      "EPSRC1_scATA_cluster" = "#ff7f00",
      "EPSRC1_scRNA_cluster" = "#ff7f00", 
      "EPSRC2_scATA_cluster" = "#6a3d9a",
      "EPSRC2_scRNA_cluster" = "#6a3d9a",
      "EPSRC4_scATA_cluster" = "#b15928",
      "EPSRC4_scRNA_cluster" = "#b15928"
  )) +
  labs(title = "Cluster Number Distribution", x = "Cluster", y = "Count")

p_cluster_est



data_prop <- data_merge_cluster %>%
  group_by(Tag, clusterNum) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Tag) %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

data_prop$modality <- ifelse(grepl("scRNA", data_prop$Tag), "scRNA", "scATAC")

p_cluster_est_prop <- ggplot(data_prop, aes(x = factor(clusterNum), y = prop, fill = Tag)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ modality, ncol = 1) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      "Human_scATAC_DX_cluster" = "#33a02c",
      "Human_scRNA_DX_cluster" = "#33a02c",
      "Human_scATAC_REM_cluster" = "#1f78b4",
      "Human_scRNA_REM_cluster" = "#1f78b4",
      "Human_scATAC_REL_cluster" = "#e31a1c",
      "Human_scRNA_REL_cluster" = "#e31a1c",
      "EPSRC1_scATA_cluster" = "#ff7f00",
      "EPSRC1_scRNA_cluster" = "#ff7f00", 
      "EPSRC2_scATA_cluster" = "#6a3d9a",
      "EPSRC2_scRNA_cluster" = "#6a3d9a",
      "EPSRC4_scATA_cluster" = "#b15928",
      "EPSRC4_scRNA_cluster" = "#b15928"
  )) +
  labs(title = "Cluster Number Distribution", x = "Cluster", y = "Proportion")

p_cluster_est_prop

set.seed(2025)
nrow <- 103
ncol <- 225

cols <- c("red", "black", "gray", "white")

prob_red <- 0.05
prob_black <- 0.7
prob_grey <- 0.1
prob_white <- 1-prob_red-prob_black-prob_grey
probs <- c(prob_red, prob_black, prob_grey, prob_white)

color_vec <- sample(cols, size = nrow * ncol, replace = TRUE, prob = probs)
mat_col <- matrix(color_vec, nrow = nrow, ncol = ncol)

df <- expand.grid(row = 1:nrow, col = 1:ncol)
df$fill <- as.vector(mat_col)

df$yplot <- nrow - df$row + 1

p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = col, y = yplot, fill = fill)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = unit(rep(0,4), "pt"))
p



# beta distribution
# parameter
n <- 20                  # total times
alpha <- 2               # alpha
beta <- 5                # Beta 
x <- 0:n                 # success times

p_bb <- dbetabinom.ab(x, size = n, shape1 = alpha, shape2 = beta)

p_binom <- dbinom(x, size = n, prob = alpha/(alpha + beta))

df <- data.frame(
  x = x,
  BetaBinomial = p_bb,
  Binomial = p_binom
)

p_betaDis <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = BetaBinomial, color = "Beta-Binomial"), size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = BetaBinomial, color = "Beta-Binomial"), size = 2) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Binomial, color = "Binomial"), linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Beta-Binomial" = "firebrick", "Binomial" = "black")) +
  labs(
    title = bquote("Beta-Binomial vs Binomial (n = " ~ .(n) ~ 
                   ", alpha = " ~ .(alpha) ~ ", beta = " ~ .(beta) ~ ")"),
    x = "Number of successes (k)",
    y = "Probability",
    color = "Distribution"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14)
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.

p_betaDis

pie tenx

df_tenx <- tribble(
  ~class, ~n,
  "stop_gained", 4,
  "missense_variant", 68,
  "splice_region_variant", 21,
  "synonymous_variant", 32,
  "5_prime_UTR_variant", 11,
  "3_prime_UTR_variant", 89,
  "non_coding_transcript_exon_variant", 101,
  "intron_variant", 841,
  "NMD_transcript_variant", 77,
  "non_coding_transcript_variant", 197,
  "upstream_gene_variant", 256,
  "downstream_gene_variant", 373,
  "regulatory_region_variant", 97,
  "intergenic_variant", 39
)

df_tenx2 <- df_tenx %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(
    class %in% c("stop_gained", "missense_variant", "synonymous_variant") ~ "Coding",
    class %in% c("splice_region_variant") ~ "Splicing",
    class %in% c("5_prime_UTR_variant","3_prime_UTR_variant",
                 "non_coding_transcript_exon_variant","intron_variant",
                 "NMD_transcript_variant","non_coding_transcript_variant") ~ "Noncoding",
    class %in% c("upstream_gene_variant","downstream_gene_variant",
                 "regulatory_region_variant","intergenic_variant") ~ "Intergenic",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(p = n / sum(n),
         label = sprintf("%s\n(n=%d, %.1f%%)", group, n, 100*p))

pie_color <- c("Coding" = "#33a02c", "Splicing" = "#1f78b4",
               "Noncoding" = "#e31a1c", "Intergenic" = "#ff7f00")

pie_tenx <-  ggplot(df_tenx2, aes(x = "", y = n, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pie_color) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

pie_tenx


ggsave("../pie_tenx.pdf", pie_tenx, width = 4.2, height = 4.2)

pie smart

df_smart <- tribble(
  ~class, ~n,
  "splice_acceptor_variant", 134,
  "splice_donor_variant", 184,
  "stop_gained", 39,
  "missense_variant", 730,
  "splice_region_variant", 405,
  "synonymous_variant", 3218,
  "coding_sequence_variant", 1,
  "5_prime_UTR_variant", 104,
  "3_prime_UTR_variant", 815,
  "non_coding_transcript_exon_variant", 1522,
  "intron_variant", 1441,
  "NMD_transcript_variant", 717,
  "non_coding_transcript_variant", 498,
  "upstream_gene_variant", 1893,
  "downstream_gene_variant", 3720,
  "regulatory_region_variant", 543,
  "intergenic_variant", 26
)

df_smart2 <- df_smart %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(
    class %in% c("stop_gained","missense_variant","synonymous_variant","coding_sequence_variant") ~ "Coding",
    class %in% c("splice_acceptor_variant","splice_donor_variant","splice_region_variant") ~ "Splicing",
    class %in% c("5_prime_UTR_variant","3_prime_UTR_variant",
                 "non_coding_transcript_exon_variant","intron_variant",
                 "NMD_transcript_variant","non_coding_transcript_variant") ~ "Noncoding",
    class %in% c("upstream_gene_variant","downstream_gene_variant",
                 "regulatory_region_variant","intergenic_variant") ~ "Intergenic",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(p = n / sum(n),
         label = sprintf("%s\n(n=%d, %.1f%%)", group, n, 100*p))

pie_color <- c("Coding" = "#33a02c", "Splicing" = "#1f78b4",
               "Noncoding" = "#e31a1c", "Intergenic" = "#ff7f00")

pie_smart <- ggplot(df_smart2, aes(x = "", y = n, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pie_color) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Variant consequences (4 classes)", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

pie_smart

ggsave("../pie_smart.pdf", pie_smart, width = 4.2, height = 4.2)
